name: book-hero
description: Editoriales Kapitel-Opener-Bild für das Online-Buch — heller Hintergrund, mehr Bildtiefe
style_instructions: Style: Editorial magazine photography aesthetic, bright natural daylight, painterly textures but realistic, journal-like composition. Color palette: warm cream and paper tones, muted earth accents, single saturated highlight. Mood: dignified, inviting, professional.
composition: Subject composed like a magazine feature opener — leading visual element, breathing room around it, clear foreground/midground/background separation. Room for chapter number and title overlay if needed.
negative: no text, no logos, no people's faces visible, no cartoon style, no 3D rendering, no harsh shadows, no AI-glow, no sterile stock-photo look
